title: SMSF administration and reporting
description: Trustee obligations include arranging an annual audit, keeping appropriate records and reporting fund's operation.
keywords: managing SMSF, reporting SMSF, reporting for SMSF, SMSF administration

content_blocks.text: Media: SMSF - Annual obligations https://tv.ato.gov.au/ato-tv/media?v=bd1bdiubfshbrd External Link ( Duration: 1:37)

content_text: Media: SMSF - Annual obligations https://tv.ato.gov.au/ato-tv/media?v=bd1bdiubfshbrd External Link ( Duration: 1:37)

child_links.title: SMSF record-keeping requirements
child_links.description: How self-managed super fund (SMSF) trustees can meet their responsibility to keep accurate tax and super records.

child_links.title: Notify us of changes to your SMSF
child_links.description: How to notify us of changes to your SMSF including trustees, directors of the corporate trustee and contact details.

child_links.title: Your SMSF auditor
child_links.description: Appoint an SMSF auditor to audit your fund each year, minimum 45 days before you need to lodge your SMSF annual return.

child_links.title: How SMSFs are taxed
child_links.description: How self-managed super funds (SMSFs) are taxed, what is assessable income, and what are allowable deductions.

child_links.title: SMSF deductible expenses
child_links.description: The deductible expenses incurred by a complying SMSF that trustees can claim.

child_links.title: Exempt current pension income
child_links.description: Methods for calculating exempt current pension income.

child_links.title: Guide to valuing SMSF assets
child_links.description: What, when, how and why SMSF trustees value assets for preparing fund accounts, statements and the SMSF annual return.

child_links.title: Lodge SMSF annual returns
child_links.description: How to lodge an SMSF annual return (SAR) once your SMSF's audit is finalised.

child_links.title: When to lodge a transfer balance account report for SMSFs
child_links.description: Which events SMSFs must report using the transfer balance account report (TBAR).

child_links.title: Commutation authorities for SMSFs
child_links.description: How to respond to SMSF commutation authorities and what happens after you respond.
